description_long: This oven features a robust, industrial design with a square, riveted metal base and a large, conical hood separated above it. The exterior is heavily weathered, showing patches of rust and darkened steel, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The front panel includes a circular, grated door with a protruding handle, likely for accessing the oven chamber. The top of the base has a perforated metal grate, visible through the gap between the base and the hood, suggesting airflow or heat dispersion functionality. The oven stands on four short, blocky legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The overall construction appears solid and heavy, suitable for outdoor or industrial urban environments.
description: A weathered, industrial metal oven with a square base, conical hood, and a grated front door. The surface is dark, rusted, and robust, with visible rivets and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the square oven base with a circular, grated door and handle, and the conical hood above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sloped hood and the solid, riveted metal side panel with no openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, unadorned metal back with the hood and base aligned, showing no access points.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hood's slope and the solid metal construction.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel or external controls are present on any side of the oven.
attribute_door_handle_type: The door handle is a small, round, protruding knob mounted horizontally on the center of the circular grated door, made of the same metal as the oven, with a utilitarian, unadorned design.
attribute_ventilation_features: A circular metal grate is present on the front door and another perforated grate is visible on the top surface of the oven base, both likely serving as ventilation features.
